mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attractions ( id, content_id, title, content_type_id, area_code, si_gun_gu_code, addr1, first_image1, latitude, longitude ) VALUES ( #{contentId}, #{contentId}, #{title}, NULLIF(#{contentTypeId}, ''), NULLIF(#{areaCode}, ''), NULLIF(#{siGunGuCode}, ''), #{addr1}, #{firstImage1}, NULLIF(#{latitude}, ''), NULLIF(#{longitude}, '') ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), addr1 = VALUES(addr1), first_image1 = VALUES(first_image1), latitude = VALUES(latitude), longitude = VALUES(longitude), content_type_id = VALUES(content_type_id), area_code = VALUES(area_code), si_gun_gu_code = VALUES(si_gun_gu_code)

INSERT INTO tour_batch_reports ( report_date, area_code, content_type_id, item_count, new_item_count, changed_item_count, missing_item_count, unchanged_item_count, change_summary, ai_summary, pdf_path ) VALUES ( #{reportDate}, #{areaCode}, #{contentTypeId}, #{itemCount}, #{newItemCount}, #{changedItemCount}, #{missingItemCount}, #{unchangedItemCount}, #{changeSummary}, #{aiSummary}, #{pdfPath} )
